title.en: STARTING OF COMBUSTION ENGINES; STARTING AIDS FOR SUCH ENGINES, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR
Starting apparatus having hand cranks (with intermediate power storage F02N5/00 - F02N15/00)
{Safety means (F02N1/02 takes precedence)}
having safety means preventing damage caused by reverse rotation
Other muscle-operated starting apparatus (with intermediate power storage F02N5/00 - F02N15/00)
having pull-cords
having foot-actuated levers
Starting apparatus having mechanical power storage
of spring type
of inertia type
Starting apparatus having fluid-driven auxiliary engines or apparatus
the apparatus being of single-stroke piston type, e.g. pistons acting on racks or pull-cords
the engines being of reciprocating-piston type (of internal-combustion type F02N7/10)
the engines being of rotary type
characterised by using auxiliary engines or apparatus of combustion type (by using explosive cartridges F02N13/00)
Starting of engines by supplying auxiliary pressure fluid to their working chambers
the pressure fluid being generated directly by combustion (by using explosive cartridges F02N13/00)
the pressure fluid being generated otherwise, e.g. by compressing air
Starting of engines by means of electric motors
{said electric motor being also used as a drive for auxiliaries, e.g. for driving transmission pumps or fuel pumps during engine stop}
{using a plurality of electric motors}
the motors having longitudinally-shiftable rotors
the motors being associated with current generators
Circuits specially adapted for starting of engines
Safety devices (F02N11/08 takes precedence)
Starting of engines by means of mobile, e.g. portable, starting sets
Starting of engines by means of electric starters with external current supply (F02N11/12 takes precedence)
Starting of engines, or driving of starting apparatus by use of explosives, e.g. stored in cartridges
Cartridges specially adapted therefor
Other power-operated starting apparatus; Component parts, details, or accessories, not provided for in, or of interest apart from groups F02N5/00 - F02N13/00
{Starters comprising a brake mechanism}
{Assembling or mounting of starting devices}
Gearing between starting-engines and started engines; Engagement or disengagement thereof
Safety devices not otherwise provided for
Starting aids for combustion engines, not otherwise provided for
{Arrangements thereof}
{Aiding engine start by acting on fuel}
{Aiding engine start by using decompression means or variable valve actuation}
{Aiding engine start by starting from a predetermined position, e.g. pre-positioning or reverse rotation}
Aiding engine start by thermal means, e.g. using lighted wicks
Subject matter not provided for in the other groups of this subclass
{Starting combustion engines by ignition means}
Parameters used for control of starting apparatus
said parameters being related to the engine
said parameters being related to the starter motor
said parameters being related to the power supply or driving circuits for the starter
said parameters being related to the vehicle or its components
said parameters being related to driver demands or status
said parameters being related to the vehicle exterior
said parameter being related to wear of starter or other components, e.g. based on total number of starts or age
Problems related to engine starting or engine's starting apparatus
Battery voltage drop at start, e.g. drops causing ECU reset
Reverse rotation of the engine
Engine stall and related control features, e.g. for automatic restart
Lubrication of starters; Sealing means for starters
Control related aspects of engine starting
characterised by the control output, i.e. means or parameters used as a control output or target
characterised by the control method
characterised by the use of digital means
